title: acampe cephalotes
intro: Acampe cephalotes, also known as the green helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Acampe cephalotes is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
